message:
🐛 Use write lock in PersistenceStore.Save() instead of read lock (#1939)

Save() mutates p.config.LastModified and writes to disk, so it needs
a full write lock (Lock/Unlock) instead of a read lock (RLock/RUnlock)
to prevent data races from concurrent Save() calls.

Fixes #1793

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
